text:
問題なさそうね。
それでは今回の特訓はクリア。
完了としましょう。

初心を忘れずに
研鑽を重ね続けていれば
貴方の実力は確実に増していくわ。

さらなる先へ至りたいのであれば
さらなる努力と特訓が必要よ。
それじゃあね。

Looks like that didn't give you any trouble.
That concludes this boot camp.
Let us see this series through to the end.

If you persevere with one eye fixed on the
future and the other reflecting on your humble
origins, you are sure to grow ever stronger.

With that said, if you intend to reach even
greater heights, you'll need to train harder and
attend more boot camps. Until then.
